ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'}),
    p2 = (a)-[:DIRECTED]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p3 = (a)-[:ACTED_IN]->(c:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})-[:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'The Departed'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s directorial and acting roles in *Taxi Driver* influence the critical reception of *The Departed*, and which specific reviews by fans of his work highlight its themes?

cypher:
MATCH (scorsese:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:DIRECTED]->(taxiDriver:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})
MATCH (scorsese)-[:ACTED_IN]->(taxiDriver)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(dealtDriverActor:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(departed:Movie {title: 'The Departed'})
MATCH (departed)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(fan:Person)-[:FOLLOWS]->(scorsese)
RETURN taxiDriver, dealtDriverActor, departed, r, fan
